languages.text: "Звук вроде и едва слышный... но при этом такой громкий, что заглушает даже шепотки. Интересно, долго мы тут при такой какофонии протянем, не поубивав друг друга?..."

traits.locale_text: ДРАФТ "Такой громкий, что заглушает даже шепотки, Лорд-капитан. И при этом словно бы... приоткрывающий дверку? Знали бы вы, как мне сейчас хочется захлопнуть ее навсегда, аж слезы душат".
"Звук вроде и едва слышный... но при этом такой громкий, что заглушает даже шепотки. Интересно, долго мы тут при такой какофонии протянем, не поубивав друг друга?..."
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."
languages.original_text: "Звук вроде и едва слышный... но при этом такой громкий, что заглушает даже шепотки. Интересно, долго мы тут при такой какофонии протянем, не поубивав друг друга?..."

traits.locale_text: "The sound is, in a way, barely audible, yet at the same time so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we will endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."
"The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

DRAFT "It's so loud it's even drowning out my whispers, Lord Captain. And at the same time, it's like it's... nudging open the door? If you knew how much I want to slam it shut for good right now — I'm choking back tears."
"The sound is, in a way, barely audible, yet at the same time so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we will endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."
"The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."
"The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

languages.text: «El sonido es casi inaudible, pero a la vez tan fuerte como para ahogar mis susurros. Me pregunto cuánto resistiremos esta cacofonía antes de empezar a matarnos entre nosotros...».
languages.original_text: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

traits.locale_text: «El sonido es casi inaudible, pero a la vez tan fuerte como para ahogar mis susurros. Me pregunto cuánto resistiremos esta cacofonía antes de empezar a matarnos entre nosotros...».

languages.text: “那声音听起来微不可闻，却又如此响亮，甚至淹没了我的低语。真不知在开始自相残杀之前，我们还能在如此刺耳的喧嚣中支撑多久……”
languages.original_text: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

traits.locale_text: “那声音听起来微不可闻，却又如此响亮，甚至淹没了我的低语。真不知在开始自相残杀之前，我们还能在如此刺耳的喧嚣中支撑多久……”

languages.text: « Le son paraît à peine audible, et pourtant si fort qu'il noie même mes murmures. J'ignore combien de temps nous pourrons endurer cette cacophonie avant de commencer à nous entretuer... »
languages.original_text: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

traits.locale_text: « Le son paraît à peine audible, et pourtant si fort qu'il noie même mes murmures. J'ignore combien de temps nous pourrons endurer cette cacophonie avant de commencer à nous entretuer... »

languages.text: "Ses zar zor duyuluyor gibi görünse de aynı zamanda fısıltılarımı bile bastıracak kadar yüksek. Birbirimizi katletmeye başlamadan önce bu kakofoniye ne kadar dayanabileceğimizi merak ediyorum..."
languages.original_text: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

traits.locale_text: "Ses zar zor duyuluyor gibi görünse de aynı zamanda fısıltılarımı bile bastıracak kadar yüksek. Birbirimizi katletmeye başlamadan önce bu kakofoniye ne kadar dayanabileceğimizi merak ediyorum..."

languages.text: "Das Geräusch ist kaum hörbar, aber gleichzeitig laut genug, um selbst meine Flüsterstimmen zu übertönen. Ich frage mich, wie lange wir diese Kakofonie ertragen, bis wir uns gegenseitig umbringen ..."
languages.original_text: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

traits.locale_text: "Das Geräusch ist kaum hörbar, aber gleichzeitig laut genug, um selbst meine Flüsterstimmen zu übertönen. Ich frage mich, wie lange wir diese Kakofonie ertragen, bis wir uns gegenseitig umbringen ..."

languages.text: 「その音はかろうじて聞こえるが、私のささやき声さえかき消すほど大きい。この不協和音にいつまで耐えれば、互いに虐殺し合うようになるのだろう......"
languages.original_text: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."

traits.locale_text: 「その音はかろうじて聞こえるが、私のささやき声さえかき消すほど大きい。この不協和音にいつまで耐えれば、互いに虐殺し合うようになるのだろう......"
